docs.title: Welcome!
docs.text: This is my new blog site created with MkDocs and Python.

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text:
• Fast Search: You can instantly search all content using the search bar at the top right.
  • Tags: Find related topics easily using the tags I've added to the posts.
  • Modern Design: A sleek and useful interface with the Material for MkDocs theme.

Enjoy reading!

docs.title: Keras
docs.text:
Keras is an API designed for human beings, not machines, for building deep learning models.

Official Website: keras.io

docs.title: 🎓 Official Learning Path
docs.text:
Follow these guides to learn Deep Learning with Keras:

  1. Keras for Beginners
  2. Developer Guides
  3. Keras Code Examples

Note: For certification, consider the broader Google Cloud Machine Learning Engineer Certification.

docs.title: NLP (Natural Language Processing)
docs.text:
Natural Language Processing (NLP) enables computers to understand and generate human language.

Core Resource: spaCy & Hugging Face

docs.title: 🎓 Official Learning Path
docs.text:
Follow these industry-standard official courses:

  1. Advanced NLP with spaCy (Free Course)
  2. The Hugging Face NLP Course
  3. Natural Language Processing with Deep Learning (Stanford CS224N)

Note: Hugging Face offers community-recognized badges and certificates for their NLP course completion.

docs.title: NLTK (Natural Language Toolkit)
docs.text:
NLTK is a leading platform for building Python programs to work with human language data.

Official Website: nltk.org

docs.title: 🎓 Official Learning Path
docs.text:
The definitive way to learn NLTK is through its official book:

  1. Natural Language Processing with Python (The NLTK Book)
  2. NLTK How-To Guides
  3. NLTK API Reference

Note: There is no official NLTK certification. Completing the "NLTK Book" is the industry standard for mastering this library.

docs.title: NumPy
docs.text:
NumPy is the fundamental package for scientific computing with Python.

Official Website: numpy.org

docs.title: 🎓 Official Learning Path
docs.text:
Follow these official tutorials to master NumPy:

  1. NumPy Quickstart
  2. NumPy Fundamentals
  3. NumPy Tutorials (Official)

Note: NumPy does not offer an official certification. Mastering these tutorials is the industry standard for proficiency.

docs.title: Python
docs.text:
Python is a versatile and powerful programming language used in web development, data science, AI, and more.

Official Website: python.org

docs.title: 🎓 Official Learning Path
docs.text:
Follow the official documentation to master Python:

  1. The Official Python Tutorial
  2. Python Beginner's Guide
  3. Python Glossary

Note: For official certification, consider the Python Institute or university-backed professional certificates.

docs.title: PyTorch
docs.text:
PyTorch is an open-source machine learning framework for research and production.

Official Website: pytorch.org

docs.title: 🎓 Official Learning Path
docs.text:
Follow the official "Learn the Basics" path:

  1. Learn the Basics (Tutorial)
  2. PyTorch Recipes
  3. Deep Learning with PyTorch: A 60 Minute Blitz

Note: While there is no official PyTorch certificate, completing these tutorials is recognized as the standard entry point for DL research.

docs.title: scikit-learn
docs.text:
scikit-learn is a simple and efficient tool for predictive data analysis.

Official Website: scikit-learn.org

docs.title: 🎓 Official Learning Path
docs.text:
Follow these steps to learn Machine Learning with scikit-learn:

  1. An Introduction to Machine Learning with scikit-learn
  2. A Tutorial on Statistical-Learning for Scientific Data Processing
  3. scikit-learn User Guide

Note: There is no official certification for scikit-learn. Completion of the official user guide is highly recommended for professionals.

docs.title: TensorFlow
docs.text:
TensorFlow is an end-to-end open-source platform for machine learning.

Official Website: tensorflow.org

docs.title: 🎓 Official Learning Path
docs.text:
Follow the official "Learn ML" path:

  1. TensorFlow Quickstart for Beginners
  2. TensorFlow Tutorials
  3. TensorFlow Guide

Note: For official validation, pursue the Google Cloud Machine Learning Engineer Certification.
